overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic neo-Tokyo inspired urban environment. The player character moves from a narrow walkway between brutalist structures, across a rain-slicked corporate plaza with towering glass skyscrapers, and into a covered underpass lined with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian walkway between concrete noise barrier and industrial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow paved path flanked by a high concrete wall on the left and a red industrial building on the right

entered.detail: tall gray concrete noise barrier with circular indentations running along the left side of the path
long red-brick industrial structure with repetitive window patterns and neon signage
massive brutalist building with a distinctive archway entrance visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the path ahead, silhouetted against the bright sky
gray concrete tile pavement with visible grid patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow urban corridor. A high concrete barrier runs along the left while a red industrial building with dark windows occupies the right. In the distance, a massive brutalist building with an archway entrance looms ahead, with palm trees visible against the golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening urban street with pedestrian walkway and traffic bollards

events.description: narrow walkway opens up into a wider street with visible traffic bollards and street furniture
brief momentary fade to black or screen darkening occurs

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the environment opens up, approaching and passing a pedestrian walking in the same direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark business attire walking ahead in the same direction, later passed by ego

entered.detail: modern black street lamp with horizontal LED light bar
short black and yellow bollards lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The path widens into a proper urban street. The concrete barrier falls away to reveal more of the open sky and surrounding architecture. The ego passes a pedestrian in business attire while approaching the large brutalist arch building. Black street lamps and traffic bollards line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: large open corporate plaza with reflective wet pavement and scattered palm tree planters

events.description: camera turns left to cross the open plaza toward the glass skyscraper
walking through shallow water or wet pavement creating reflective mirror surfaces on the ground

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking diagonally across the expansive wet plaza, navigating between palm tree planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking across the plaza in the distance

entered.detail: tall crystalline glass tower with reflective facade dominating the left side of the plaza
multi-level highway overpass structure with vehicles visible on the upper deck
large rectangular planters with palm trees and glowing cyan accent lighting at the base
wet pavement creating mirror-like reflections of the buildings and sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast corporate plaza with a towering glass skyscraper on the left and wet reflective pavement underfoot. The ego turns left to cross the plaza, passing between illuminated palm tree planters. An elevated highway overpass spans the background while the ground creates mirror-like reflections of the golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with digital advertising pillars

events.description: entering the covered underpass beneath the highway overpass with artificial lighting
transition from natural golden hour light to greenish fluorescent artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered underpass area, passing by digital advertisements and concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction, passing close to the camera

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboards mounted on concrete pillars displaying holographic advertisements
massive square concrete pillars supporting the highway structure overhead
long horizontal fluorescent light tubes emitting greenish-white light along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The ego enters a covered underpass beneath the highway, where natural light gives way to greenish artificial fluorescent lighting. Digital advertisement screens glow on the concrete pillars, displaying various holographic content. The environment shifts from open and natural to enclosed and artificially lit, with the highway structure now directly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow industrial corridor into a vast corporate plaza and finally into a dimly lit urban underpass. It begins by moving along a concrete barrier beside a red industrial building, heading toward a massive brutalist archway under a golden hour sky. As the path widens into an open street, the camera passes a pedestrian and street lamps before the environment expands into a sprawling plaza featuring a towering glass skyscraper and rain-slicked pavement. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left across the reflective ground and illuminated palm trees, moving toward the shadow of an elevated highway. Finally, the natural golden light gives way to greenish fluorescent tones as the camera enters a covered underpass lined with glowing holographic advertisements on concrete pillars.
